doctors.name: Dr. Priya Ramesh
doctors.bio: Dr. Priya Ramesh is a renowned cardiologist with over 15 years of experience in interventional cardiology. She has performed over 5000 successful surgeries.

doctors.name: Dr. Anish Kumar
doctors.bio: Dr. Anish Kumar specializes in complex brain and spine surgeries with a focus on minimally invasive techniques.
